name.description: Visual display name of the item.

description.description: Flavour/lore text rendered in the inventory card.

value.description: Gold purchase value. Reselling fetches half value by default.

reputation.description: Reputation value. Contributes to player's reputation upon acquisition and museum's reputation when placed in display cases.

slot.description: The equipment slot target. Required for weapons, spells, and armor.

actionPoints.description: Action Points (AP) required to swing/equip/use inside combat.

bonusHitChance.description: Flat bonus added to d20 hit rolls. Used for weapons and spells.

attributes.description: Custom parameter extensions depending on item type.

damageRoll.description: Damage formula: Standard NdF[+/-M] (e.g. '1d6+1') or range (e.g. '1-4').

armorClassBonus.description: Flat AC protection added when equipped. Used for Armor.

healingAmount.description: HP restored on consumption. Supports flat numbers or dice notation.

teleportScene.description: Scene ID to teleport to upon usage. Used for consumable items.
